_note: Transcribed from the Spirit Island Wiki's adversary pages (spiritislandwiki.com), one fetch per adversary, 2026-07-09. Every adversary's level range is 0 (base difficulty) through 6, confirmed individually on each adversary's own wiki page rather than assumed from one.
